title: athyrium pedatum
intro: Athyrium pedatum, also known as the American lady fern or lady fern, is a type of perennial fern that belongs to the Athyrium genus and is native to North America. The medicinal properties of Athyrium pedatum include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and support the immune system. Athyrium pedatum is often prepared for herbal use in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are believed to promote overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and stress.
